required_preferences.fact: Explores street art and galleries exclusively in Berlin and the surrounding area, pausing cultural immersion in new cities due to medical travel restrictions

supersedes.fact: Explores local street art and galleries in every city she visits — never skips opportunities for cultural immersion

required_preferences.fact: Meets parents in person for weekly lunches or weekend visits whenever both are in Berlin, rarely relies on group video calls now that they live nearby

supersedes.fact: Checks in with parents monthly via a group video call, never lets more than six weeks pass without contact

required_preferences.fact: Attends indie film screenings or festivals whenever possible, prioritizing them over mainstream cinemas
Schedules flexible work assignments and travel to London more frequently to provide ongoing support for her sister and newborn, even at the expense of turning down some freelance opportunities
Devotes every evening on location to reviewing raw video footage with her field team, pausing typical solo travel journaling and personal social media updates for the duration of the grant project
Carries a personal translation card explaining her allergy and emergency protocol in the local language, presenting it at every restaurant or market while abroad

persona: A solo freelance photographer who travels internationally for assignments
